headline: Iran Attack Raises More Questions About Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
summary: Polymarket’s social-media account has repeatedly identified signs of insider trading on its prediction-market platform. It isn’t clear what happens next.

headline: Is CME Group Stock Outperforming the Dow?

headline: Iran war prediction market bets draw heat: 'Insane this is legal'
summary: Wagers were placed over the weekend about the fate of Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the bombardment.
